sections.paragraph:
m.-

(1) a hill, an acclivity, Isa 32:14 Mic 4:8 with the art. הָעֹפֶל [Ophel], pr.n. of a hill to the east of mount Zion, which was surrounded and fortified by a separate wall, 2Ki 5:24 [this refers to some other place], 2Ch 27:3 33:14 Neh 3:27 11:21 compare Jos. Bell. Jud., vi. 6, § 3.

(2) a tumour, plur. עפלים (read עֳפָלִים) Deu 28:27 1Sa 5:6. seqq. כתיב, used of tumours on the anus. (Arab. عفَلُ tumor in ano virorum, vel in pudendis mulierum, see Schrœderi Origg. Hebr., cap. iv. p. 54, 55. H. Alb. Schultens ad Meidanii Prov., p. 23). In קרי there is instead טְחֹורִים, which see.
